CustomField.formula: Case( TermsOfPayment2__c , "1", InvoiceDate__c +30, "2", InvoiceDate__c +30, "3", InvoiceDate__c +10, "4", InvoiceDate__c +30, "5", InvoiceDate__c +60, "7", InvoiceDate__c +30, "8", InvoiceDate__c +90, "9", InvoiceDate__c +30, "10", InvoiceDate__c +15, "13", InvoiceDate__c +20, "15", InvoiceDate__c +45, InvoiceDate__c)
CustomField.label: Invoice Due Date
